integration_notes.recommended_ingestion_flow: CSV in SharePoint or Azure Storage -> Power Automate/Azure Data Factory -> Dataverse upsert -> Power BI semantic model
integration_notes.rest_learning_value: Each entity maps naturally to REST collection endpoints with GET/POST/PATCH/DELETE methods.
integration_notes.soap_learning_value: SOAP/XML can be introduced later by transforming equivalent HR payloads into XML envelopes before landing into these Dataverse entities.
integration_notes.governance_value: The file centralizes schema, ownership, sensitivity, relationships and API contracts so it can act as a metadata source for classifiers and intelligent SharePoint/Dataverse configuration.
